caption: Three people are seated on chairs on a stage in front of a dark purple background with glowing neon accents. A man on the left wears a white button-down shirt and dark trousers; he is gesturing with his hands while speaking. Beside him, a woman wears a black t-shirt with the text "LIFE'S IN YOUR" and black trousers, sitting with her hands folded in her lap. To her right, a man wears a grey suit and light-colored shirt, sitting with his hands clasped. In front of the first man is a white, boxy, industrial-looking piece of equipment. As the sequence progresses, the man in the white shirt continues to speak and gesture with his right arm. The woman remains still, while the man in the grey suit shifts his posture, leaning slightly forward and looking toward the speaker. The lighting remains consistent across the scene.
